ward_formula_scope: superconducting BdG Ward closure requires extended electromagnetic + order-parameter collective kernel diagnostics; bare electromagnetic normal-like residual is not a closure criterion
superconducting_bdg_closure_formula: extended electromagnetic + order-parameter collective Ward identity

bdg_extended_ward_summary.normal_like_em_ward_residual: retained as electromagnetic-block diagnostic only; not used as superconducting BdG closure

rows.twist_offset_rule: q-independent nested symmetry-preserving equal-weight twist quadrature; offsets are not fitted to Ward residuals
rows.normal_like_em_residual_interpretation: bare_em_block_only_not_expected_to_close_in_superconducting_state; normal-state electromagnetic Ward contraction is diagnostic-only for BdG
rows.extended_ward_formula: K_ext=[[K_AA,K_Aeta],[K_etaA,K_etaeta]] with W_A and W_eta contractions
rows.order_parameter_phase_normalization: not_applicable
rows.order_parameter_gauge_vector_rule: not_applicable
rows.phase_tangent_source: not_applicable
rows.extended_to_schur_consistency_interpreta: not_applicable_without_collective_block
rows.order_parameter_tangent_rule: not_applicable_for_bare_em_block
rows.unsupported_reason: bare electromagnetic block alone is not a closed superconducting BdG Ward object

rows.twist_offset_rule: q-independent nested symmetry-preserving equal-weight twist quadrature; offsets are not fitted to Ward residuals
rows.normal_like_em_residual_interpretation: bare_em_block_only_not_expected_to_close_in_superconducting_state; normal-state electromagnetic Ward contraction is diagnostic-only for BdG
rows.extended_ward_formula: left: W_A^L K_AA + W_eta^L K_etaA, W_A^L K_Aeta + W_eta^L K_etaeta; right: K_AA W_A^R + K_Aeta W_eta^R, K_etaA W_A^R + K_etaeta W_eta^R
rows.order_parameter_phase_normalization: dimensionless theta; phase vertex is dH_BdG/dtheta = delta0 * dH_BdG/deta2
rows.order_parameter_gauge_vector_rule: global U(1) pair phase gives delta_theta = 2 * chi
rows.phase_tangent_source: spm PairingAnsatz.phase_pairing_matrix with bond_endpoint_gauge form factor
rows.extended_to_schur_consistency_interpreta: algebraic check only: W_A Pi_GI equals extended EM equation minus collective equation propagated through solve(K_etaeta, .); no response projection or repair is applied
rows.order_parameter_tangent_rule: W_eta is derived from global U(1) transformation of the PairingAnsatz collective phase tangent; it is not fit from Ward residuals

rows.twist_offset_rule: q-independent nested symmetry-preserving equal-weight twist quadrature; offsets are not fitted to Ward residuals

rows.order_parameter_phase_normalization: energy-like eta2 coordinate with eta2 = delta0 * theta
rows.order_parameter_gauge_vector_rule: global U(1) pair phase gives delta_eta2 = delta0 * delta_theta = 2 * delta0 * chi

normal_reference_comparison_summary.interpretation: normal-state closure formula is only for normal response; this block is an integration-error reference and is not used to judge superconducting BdG Ward closure
